message:
test(e2e): refactor homepage E2E spec for current UI selectors and flow

Update homepage.spec.ts to align with the current UI structure:
- Fix selector references for changed component markup
- Simplify assertion chains and reduce test fragility
- Update expected text content and navigation targets
- Remove stale test cases for deprecated UI elements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
